# V43 Repository Documentation Upgrade

## Summary

This release upgrades the repository front door, documentation suite, community templates, and documentation verification tooling.

## Added or improved

- README with badges, route catalog, diagrams, local verification, Web UI deployment summary, and claim boundaries.
- Documentation index, getting started, architecture, demo catalog, proof objects, deployment, workflow, security/privacy, claim, AGIALPHA, troubleshooting, release checklist, FAQ, GitHub settings, accessibility/SEO, and publication standard.
- Issue templates and pull request checklist.
- Dependency-free docs link checker and documentation test.

## Boundaries preserved

No pages were removed. No package dependencies, analytics, cookies, forms, public wallet behavior, token offer, or unsupported claims were introduced.

## Commands run

See the final implementation report for exact command results.
